title: Ice Crypts

The '''Ice Crypts''' were a network of subterranean caves in the glaciers several hundred meters beneath the [[Hasamadhi warehouse district]], near the south pole of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="core" />

Thirteen burial chambers lay at the end of the tunnel system, each containing a mummified corpse with weapons, armor, and trophies of war. Archaeologists believed them to be the remains of the chiefs of the thirteen nations of [[Zhell/Legends|Zhell]], who presumably had fled there after their defeat at the hands of the [[Taung/Legends|Taungs]] in [[Pre-Republic era|Pre-Republic]] times. It was one of the only known artifacts of this time period.<ref name="core" />

In [[10,000 BBY]], the historian [[Vicendi]] included the Ice Crypts in his list of the [[Twenty Wonders of the Galaxy]].<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

While the crypts were open to the public in the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], but the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] restricted them in an effort to suppress information on pre-Republic civilizations. The temperature was maintained to keep the tunnels from melting, and tourists were prevented from entering the chambers themselves. Some curators claimed to have heard ghostly voices at night reciting the chant "[[Duel of the Fates|''korah mahtah'']]."<ref name="core" />
